reviews.text: The university offers guided tours mostly in Spanish, but there is one tour in English at 14.00. It is worth checking in advance if the times change. There is an office just at the main entrance.

reviews.author: Ellie
reviews.text: The University of Alcalá is a prestigious institution located in Alcalá de Henares, Spain. It has a rich history dating back to 1293 and is known for its contributions to literature, science, and culture. The university's campus is recognized as a UNESCO World Heritage site.
